results.rendered_html:
hariṇī
1 A female deer, doe; cakitahariṇīprekṣaṇā  Me. 82 ,  R. 9. 55 , 14. 69. 
2 One of the four classes of women (also called citriṇī q. v.)
3 Yellow jasmine.
4 A good golden image.
5 N. of a metre.
6 The green colour.
7 Turmeric.
8 Madder.
Comp.
— dṛś a. deer-eyed. (
— f.) a deer-eyed woman; kimabhavadvipine hariṇīdṛśaḥ  U. 3. 27.
